taxonomy: Myrospermum toluiferum is classified under the family Sapindaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the soapberry family. This family is part of the larger order Sapindales, which also includes other plant families such as Anacardiaceae and Rutaceae. Myrospermum toluiferum is a tropical plant species native to Central and South America. Its classification as a member of the Sapindaceae family indicates its close relationships with other plants in this group, such as the soapberry tree.
